item.title: Reading_Day_by_Day
item.description: 3.17 TiTLE: 100-Million-Year-Old Seafloor Sediment Bacteria Have Been Resuscitated Words - - - immortal resuscitate gyre arid nutrient miserly corpse poo pelagic clay calcareous nanofossil ooze milieu centimeter microbe incubation progeny spore translucent
